title: Man Balances Running Chainsaw on Chin for 4 Minutes. New World Record.
script: David Rush just balanced a live, running chainsaw on his chin for 4 minutes and 1 second — and now holds the Guinness World Record. The Idaho man used an electric chainsaw so the blade wouldn't jerk unpredictably. He did it at his son's soccer practice. His wife and kids watched from the sideline. He said he will never attempt it again. Guinness certified it anyway.
